decision: Assistant Runtime Repository Foundation created inside VECTRA.
rationale: Product Owner requires VECTRA to be the persistent professional workspace, not a separate digital organization platform.
consequences: Runtime repository exists as internal VECTRA workspace.

object_changed: VECTRA identity and command interaction model
decision: VECTRA becomes the identity root; Product Team Assistant becomes an internal professional model; Product Owner uses natural language commands.
rationale: Product Owner must not remember technical commands, and Runtime must be able to read back what was written.
related_documents: VECTRA-RUNTIME-0003 Natural Command Guidance & Readback Verification
